channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Live Updates: Trump says "whole civilization will die tonight" as strikes on Iran ramp up ahead of his deadline - CBS News

item.description:

  5. CBS SHIFTS “COMICS UNLEASHED with BYRON ALLEN” TO 11:35 PM BEGINNING FRIDAY, MAY 22  Paramount Press Express

item.title: Colorado QB Dominiq Ponder's BAC double limit in fatal crash - ESPN
item.description:
1. Colorado QB Dominiq Ponder's BAC double limit in fatal crash  ESPN
  2. Autopsy reveals Colorado QB's blood-alcohol level was double the legal limit during fatal crash: report  Fox News
  3. Colorado QB had significant amount of alcohol in his system when he died  USA Today
  4. Colorado QB Dominiq Ponder had twice the legal limit of alcohol in his system when he died in a car crash  Los Angeles Times
  5. CU quarterback had BAC above legal limit at time of fatal crash, autopsy report says  KUSA.com

item.title: AI's impact on jobs: not all doom and gloom - Axios
item.description:
1. AI's impact on jobs: not all doom and gloom  Axios

  3. AI is cutting 16,000 U.S. jobs a month—and Gen Z is taking the brunt, Goldman Sachs says  Yahoo Finance
  4. The one piece of data that could actually shed light on your job and AI  MIT Technology Review
  5. Anthropic's research shows that AI can already do a huge portion of many jobs; its top economist talks about how that could shape the future of work  Fortune

item.title: What happens at 8 p.m.? Even Trump’s allies aren’t sure. - Politico
